name: TestResult
description: The outcome of executing a test case, capturing pass/fail status, execution details, and any defects found.

id.description: Unique identifier for the test result.

test_case_id.description: Identifier of the test case that was executed.

test_run_id.description: Identifier of the test run this result belongs to.

status.description: Overall pass/fail status of the test case execution.

executed_by.description: Username or identifier of the person or system that executed the test.

executed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the test was executed.

duration_ms.description: Time taken to execute the test case in milliseconds.

environment.description: The environment in which the test was executed (e.g., staging, production).

build_version.description: Software build version under test when this result was recorded.

defects.description: List of defect or bug identifiers found during this test execution.

comment.description: Tester comments or observations about the test execution.

step_results.description: Results for each individual step within the test case.

step_number.description: The step number this result corresponds to.

actual_result.description: The actual result observed for this step.
